name: 40-second Omelet
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs and water together until fully blended.
2. In a 10-inch omelet pan, melt the butter over medium heat until it sizzles when a drop of water is added.
3. Pour in the egg mixture. The edges should set immediately.
4. Using an inverted pancake turner, carefully lift the cooked portions at the edge toward the center, allowing the uncooked parts to come into contact with the hot pan surface as needed.
5. Continue cooking until the egg is fully set and no longer flows.
6. Fill the omelet with 1/2 cup of desired fillings.
7. With a pancake turner, fold the omelet in half and invert it onto a plate.
8. Serve immediately.
